overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval port city at night. The character moves from narrow cobblestone alleys through a harbor area with large sailing ships, then up a narrow path past guards, and into wider city streets. The scene is illuminated by torchlight and moonlight, creating a dark atmospheric fantasy setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval alley between stone buildings

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through narrow cobblestone alleyways flanked by stone walls and wooden market stalls

entered.detail: rough stone wall of medieval building with wooden beams
wooden containers and crates stacked along the wall
burning torch mounted on the stone wall providing warm orange light
stone archway leading to more open area ahead
wooden stall structure with goods displayed

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow medieval alley with rough stone walls and cobblestone ground. Torch sconces provide warm orange lighting against the cool night. Wooden barrels and market stalls line the path as Geralt walks toward a distant stone archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor plaza with market stalls

events.description: exits narrow alley through stone archway into open harbor plaza
passes by NPC merchant standing near wooden stall with torch lighting

agents.ego_description: walking toward the harbor opening, passing a merchant NPC standing by a stall on the right

notable_agents.action: merchant standing beside wooden stall with lit torch, facing the street

entered.detail: opening revealing the harbor and water beyond the buildings
tall masts of sailing ships visible in the distance against the night sky
wooden canopy structure over market area

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the narrow alley into a more open plaza area. The harbor becomes visible in the distance with tall ship masts silhouetted against the night sky. A merchant NPC stands by a wooden stall on the right, illuminated by torchlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dock with moored sailing ships

events.description: reaches the waterfront promenade with large sailing ships moored at the docks

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront beside large moored sailing ships, moving from left to right across the harbor view

entered.detail: large wooden sailing vessel with multiple masts moored at the dock
dark water of the harbor reflecting distant lights
wooden dock planks and pilings along the water edge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to the waterfront where large sailing ships are moored at the docks. Geralt walks along the wooden piers with the harbor water on the right. The ships tower overhead with their masts reaching into the night sky, while distant city lights twinkle across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow ascending cobblestone path alongside stone wall

events.description: turns inland away from waterfront into narrow ascending street with stone walls
approaches and passes two city guards holding torches on the narrow path

agents.ego_description: walking up a narrow cobblestone path that ascends alongside a high stone retaining wall, passing guards with torches

notable_agents.action: two guards in armor holding torches, walking down the path toward Geralt

entered.detail: tall stone wall running alongside the ascending path
wooden scaffolding and construction structures against the left wall
armed guards patrolling the narrow street with torchlight

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns away from the water and enters a narrow cobblestone path that ascends between stone walls. Wooden scaffolding appears on the left. Two guards with torches approach from ahead, walking down the path, and Geralt passes them in the confined space.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide cobblestone street in medieval city center

events.description: emerges from narrow path into wider cobblestone street with multi-story buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along a wide cobblestone street lined with multi-story stone buildings and scattered pedestrians

entered.detail: broad cobblestone road allowing for easier passage
tall stone building with multiple floors and lit windows
wooden cart or wagon parked along the street

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wider cobblestone street with multi-story stone buildings on both sides. A wooden cart sits parked on the right. The street is broader and more open than the previous narrow path, with building facades featuring lit windows and architectural details visible in the torchlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of a medieval alleyway into the expansive openness of a moonlit harbor. It begins amidst rough stone walls and cobblestones, moving past wooden barrels and market stalls illuminated by the warm orange glow of torch sconces. As Geralt passes through a distant stone archway, the narrow path opens into a plaza where the silhouettes of tall ship masts first appear against the night sky. The scene then expands further as the camera reaches the waterfront, shifting from the stone city to wooden piers. Finally, the view opens fully to the docks, where towering sailing ships loom overhead and distant city lights twinkle across the dark harbor water.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt transitions from a confined, ascending alleyway into a broader urban street. It begins with the character turning away from the waterfront to enter a narrow cobblestone path that climbs between high stone walls and wooden scaffolding. As he moves forward, the space remains tight while he passes two guards carrying torches who approach from the opposite direction. The scene then opens and expands as the path gives way to a wider cobblestone thoroughfare lined with multi-story stone buildings. Finally, the environment shifts from the claustrophobic alley to an open street featuring parked wooden carts and building facades illuminated by the warm glow of torchlight and lit windows.
